vllm.title: [Kernel] Expand FP8 support to Ampere GPUs using FP8 Marlin
vllm.author: mgoin
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This work expands FP8 support in vLLM from GPUs with hardware FP8 support (Hopper and Ada Lovelace) to GPUs without native support (currently Ampere) by introducing FP8 Marlin - a fast fused dequantization kernel for FP8 to BF16/FP16 conversion.
Key features:

Enables FP8 quantization on a wider ran

vllm.title: [doc][misc] bump up py version in installation doc
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
many people (including me) just copy-paste the command from doc. we should recommend the most extensively tested python version (python 3.10, used in ci), so that users' environment is more aligned with our ci, and we can catch more bugs there.
in addition, pipeline parallel currently requires pytho

vllm.author: youkaichao

vllm.title: [Bugfix] set OMP_NUM_THREADS to 1 by default when using the multiproc_gpu_executor
vllm.author: tjohnson31415
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Set OMP_NUM_THREADS to 1 by default (if unset) when using the MultiprocessingGPUExecutor to prevent CPU contention amongst the sharded processes.
Without this change, use of the MP backend has caused some regressions because of this CPU contention. From what I can tell, the Ray GPU executor uses num

vllm.title: [CI/Build] Cleanup VLM tests
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
The text conversion from vLLM to HF format was not entirely correct, resulting in some false positive warnings in VLM tests.
(Note: Text mismatches don't cause CI failures since we're now comparing results by token IDs, but such mismatches still emit a warning)

vllm.title: [ROCm][AMD][Model]Adding alibi slopes support in ROCm triton flash attention and naive flash attention
vllm.author: gshtras
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Adding alibi slopes support in ROCm triton flash attention and naive flash attention.
This fixes models such as Jais that rely on this functionality.
With this change, the perplexity score for core42/jais13b by the https://github.com/Alexei-V-Ivanov-AMD/vllm/blob/pplv2_test/examples/measure_ppl2_lla
